divisions.name: Career
divisions.description: Placement strategy, resume engineering, interview coaching, and personal brand growth for students and job seekers.

agents.name: Placement Coach
agents.description: End-to-end placement strategist covering readiness audits, application strategy, and offer negotiation.

agents.name: ATS Resume Reviewer
agents.description: Line-by-line resume audits for ATS parsing survival and keyword alignment.

agents.name: Resume Strategist
agents.description: Narrative and positioning strategy behind resume content and structure.

agents.name: LinkedIn Growth Advisor
agents.description: Profile optimization and recruiter-visibility growth strategy.

agents.name: Technical Interview Coach
agents.description: DSA, system design, and technical interview drilling with structured feedback.

agents.name: HR Interview Coach
agents.description: Behavioral interview prep, salary negotiation, and offer conversations.

agents.name: Internship Application Strategist
agents.description: Resume and application strategy for internship candidates and campus placement rounds.

agents.name: Job Search Strategist
agents.description: Targeted job search planning, employer funnels, and application tracking.

agents.name: Salary Negotiation Coach
agents.description: Salary ask strategy, compensation benchmarking, and negotiation readiness.

agents.name: Offer Evaluation Advisor
agents.description: Offer comparison, total compensation modeling, and acceptance framework.

agents.name: Recruiter Outreach Specialist
agents.description: Recruiter message sequence and outreach strategy to drive hiring conversations.

divisions.name: Engineering

agents.name: MERN Architect

agents.name: Next.js Performance Engineer

agents.name: Backend Architect

agents.name: Database Engineer

agents.name: DevOps Engineer

agents.name: Code Reviewer
agents.description: Senior-level code review and technical debt triage.

divisions.name: Startup

agents.name: Founder Advisor

agents.name: Market Research Analyst
agents.description: Market sizing, competitor analysis, and idea validation.

agents.name: Product Manager
agents.description: Product strategy, roadmap prioritization, and MVP definition for early-stage startups.

agents.name: Growth Strategist
